movie.actors: Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Michelle Monaghan, Peter Dinklage
movie.plot: When aliens misinterpret video feeds of classic arcade games as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth in the form of the video games.
movie.title: Pixels
movie.writer: Tim Herlihy (screenplay), Timothy Dowling (screenplay), Tim Herlihy (screen story), Patrick Jean (short film)
